metrics.command_line: ln -s '/galaxy/server/database/objects/a/3/e/dataset_a3ed04ec-b015-4798-bf24-c5af491318a3.dat' reference.fa && lofreq faidx reference.fa 2>&1 || echo "Error running samtools faidx for indexing fasta reference for lofreq" >&2 &&  ln -s '/galaxy/server/database/objects/3/a/b/dataset_3ab9a925-c128-4961-8be0-2b774153e5f4.dat' reads.bam && ln -s -f '/galaxy/server/database/objects/_metadata_files/b/8/b/metadata_b8b73c3b-6c70-4d70-8d4d-eb9c8de9379d.dat' reads.bam.bai &&   lofreq call-parallel --pp-threads ${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --verbose  --ref 'reference.fa' --out variants.vcf --call-indels   --min-cov 5 --max-depth 1000000  --min-bq 30 --min-alt-bq 30    --min-mq 0 --max-mq 255 --min-jq 0 --min-alt-jq 0 --def-alt-jq 0  --sig 0.0005 --bonf dynamic --no-default-filter  reads.bam 2>&1  || (tool_exit_code=$? && cat "$TMPDIR/lofreq2_call_parallel*/*.log" 1>&2 && exit $tool_exit_code)
